name: delete_post
description: Delete a specific post from LinkedIn using its share or UGC post URN identifier. Deletions are idempotent -- deleting an already-deleted post returns a 204 without error.

parameters.name: encoded_post_urn
parameters.description: URL-encoded URN of the post to delete (e.g., urn%3Ali%3Ashare%3A6844785523593134080).
